'''jashata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycolactone|mycolactone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycolactone|mycolactone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jashata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæshætæth|jæshætæth]] || [[word:jæshætæj|jæshætæj]] || [[word:jæshætæsh|jæshætæsh]] || [[word:jæshætæ|jæshætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashashatath|jashashatath]] || [[word:jashashataj|jashashataj]] || [[word:jashashatash|jashashatash]] || [[word:jashashata|jashashata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashatath|jashatath]] || [[word:jashataj|jashataj]] || [[word:jashatash|jashatash]] || [[word:jashata|jashata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashaftafth|jashaftafth]] || [[word:jashaftafj|jashaftafj]] || [[word:jashaftafsh|jashaftafsh]] || [[word:jashaftaf|jashaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jashatatha|jashatatha]] || [[word:jashataja|jashataja]] || [[word:jashatasha|jashatasha]] || [[word:jashataka|jashataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jashatath|jashatath]] || [[word:jashataj|jashataj]] || [[word:jashatash|jashatash]] || [[word:jashata|jashata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jashatathal|jashatathal]] || [[word:jashatajal|jashatajal]] || [[word:jashatashal|jashatashal]] || [[word:jashatakal|jashatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jashataathatha|jashataathatha]] || [[word:jashataajaja|jashataajaja]] || [[word:jashataashasha|jashataashasha]] || [[word:jashataaka|jashataaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jashatathan|jashatathan]] || [[word:jashatajan|jashatajan]] || [[word:jashatashan|jashatashan]] || [[word:jashatakan|jashatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jashatathaoro|jashatathaoro]] || [[word:jashatajaoro|jashatajaoro]] || [[word:jashatashaoro|jashatashaoro]] || [[word:jashatakaoro|jashatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
